title: omalotheca caucasica
intro: Omalotheca caucasica, also known as Caucasus woolly thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and even as an antiseptic to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Omalotheca caucasica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other health conditions.
